title: Decentralized Identifiers (DIDs) v1.0
quote: DIDs are URIs that associate a DID subject with a DID document.

title: DID Core Privacy Considerations
quote: DID controllers can mitigate this privacy risk by using pairwise DIDs that are unique to each relationship.

title: Verifiable Credentials Data Model v2.0
quote: This data model supports being secured using zero-knowledge proofs.

title: VC 2.0 Identifier-Based Correlation
quote: Holders aiming to reduce correlation are encouraged to use verifiable credentials from issuers that support selectively disclosing correlating identifiers.

title: Ethereum Attestation Service
quote: Ethereum Attestation Service (EAS) is an infrastructure public good for making attestations onchain or offchain about anything.

title: EAS Overview
quote: EAS works with only two smart contracts. One to register an attestation schema, and another to make attestations on Schemas.

title: ethereum-attestation-service/eas-contracts
quote: Schemas can be registered using the SchemaRegistry.sol contract, and attestations are made using the EAS.sol contract.

title: EAS SDK README
quote: The attestByDelegation function allows you to create a delegated on-chain attestation for a specific schema.

title: EAS SDK Offchain Attestation Example
quote: This function will return a signed offchain attestation object containing the UID, signature, and attestation data.
